command: cargo run -p aeronum-core --example gguf_header_smoke -- --model /home/rob/models/mistralai_Mistral-Small-3.1-24B-Instruct-2503-Q4_K_M.gguf --device rocm --max-tokens 16 --prompt AeroNum GGUF smoke prompt
